'''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 8''' is the eighth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' graphic novels]] series.

==Publisher's summary==
''A malfunctioning [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] tries to escape its doomed fate on the battlefield; [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] comes face-to-face with her [[Death/Legends|deadly]] past; and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] becomes entangled in a nefarious espionage plot in this pulse-pounding volume of all-ages adventures! Featuring four fantastic tales of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] versus [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] action, this [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]]-kicking book of blockbuster battles captures some amazing moments in the most exciting era of [[Star Wars]]! These totally rocking stories, told in the same stripped-down stylization as [[Cartoon Network]]'s [[Star Wars: Clone Wars|micro-series]], are why everyone loves Star Wars!''
